_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY - Created by c4rl0s | GamzyHost
name: RuneScape: Dragonwilds
author: c4rl0s@gamzyhost
description: RuneScape: Dragonwilds Dedicated Server. A survival and exploration game developed by Jagex. | Egg created by c4rl0s @ GamzyHost

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# RuneScape: Dragonwilds - Install Script
# Egg created by c4rl0s @ GamzyHost
# SteamCMD AppID: 4019830

## Download and install SteamCMD
cd /tmp
curl -sSL -o steamcmd.tar.gz https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd
tar -xzvf steamcmd.tar.gz -C /mnt/server/steamcmd
cd /mnt/server/steamcmd

chown -R root:root /mnt
export HOME=/mnt/server

## Install game server
./steamcmd.sh \
    +force_install_dir /mnt/server \
    +login anonymous \
    +app_update 4019830 \
    $( [[ -z ${SRCDS_BETAID} ]] || printf %s "-beta ${SRCDS_BETAID}" ) \
    validate \
    +exit

## Copy steamclient libraries
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk{32,64}
cp -v linux32/steamclient.so /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32/steamclient.so
cp -v linux64/steamclient.so /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64/steamclient.so

## Verify installation and make binary executable
cd /mnt/server/RSDragonwilds/Binaries/Linux
count=$(find . -maxdepth 1 -name '*-Linux-Shipping' -type f -executable | wc -l)
if [[ $count -eq 0 ]]; then
    echo -e "\n\nSteamCMD failed to install the RuneScape: Dragonwilds Dedicated Server!"
    echo -e "\tTry reinstalling the server again.\n"
    exit 1
else
    chmod +x *-Linux-Shipping
fi

## Create config directory and file
mkdir -p /mnt/server/RSDragonwilds/Saved/Config/LinuxServer
touch /mnt/server/RSDragonwilds/Saved/Config/LinuxServer/DedicatedServer.ini

echo -e "\nRuneScape: Dragonwilds installation complete."
echo -e "Egg created by c4rl0s @ GamzyHost\n"

variables.name: Owner ID
variables.description: Your RuneScape: Dragonwilds Player ID. Find it in-game at the bottom of the Settings menu. The server WILL NOT start without this value.

variables.name: Server Name
variables.description: The name of your server as it appears in the server browser.

variables.name: Default World Name
variables.description: Name of the world created on first launch. Cannot be changed after the first start.

variables.name: World Password
variables.description: Optional. Password required to join the world. Leave empty for a public server.

variables.name: Admin Password
variables.description: Any player who enters this password in Server Management will be granted admin privileges.

variables.name: Max Players
variables.description: Maximum number of simultaneous players. Recommended maximum: 6.

variables.name: Query Port
variables.description: UDP port used by Steam for server queries.

variables.name: Branch Name
variables.description: Leave empty for default branch. Use 'experimental' for the experimental branch.
